---
title: '2014/02/23 Journal Sun'
date: '2014-02-23T13:24:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '9214468990132112993'
blogger_filename: '/2014/02/02232014-journal-sun.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

02/21 and 02/21: Space Cadet...<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
VOD:</h4>
<a href="http://fedbyfaith.blogspot.com/2014/02/youtube-reaction.html">http://fedbyfaith.blogspot.com/2014/02/youtube-reaction.html</a><br />
<br />
<span style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">Deuteronomy 8:18</span><br />
<div style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">
New International Version (NIV)</div>
<div style="background-color: white; box-sizing: border-box; color: #333333; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18.200000762939453px;">
18 But remember the Lord your God, for it is he who gives you the ability to produce wealth, and so confirms his covenant, which he swore to your ancestors, as it is today.</div>
<br />
<h4>
Thankful:</h4>
I'm thankful for being in The Word as often as I have been, and dedicate to be in it MORE this week. So many have been deceived, as You Tube Comments prove. So I'm going to double that effort.<br />
<br />
<h4>
Feeling:</h4>
Good. This week could be the week I get a new and better Job! Mortgage Modification came through! Tax Return is coming. We are re-arranging things financially with Flavia's great help! She is full of wisdom.<br />
<br />
<h4>
What's Up?</h4>
I'm going to go get ready now.<br />
See the YouTube post.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
</h4>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
